name: Sample Custom BPA Rules
description: Example custom rule file. Place JSON files in config/bpa_rules/ to add custom BPA rules. Each file is loaded automatically on BPA initialization.

rules.Name: Sample: Measure names should be descriptive
rules.Description: Measure names should be at least 3 characters long to be descriptive.
rules.FixExpression: Rename the measure to a more descriptive name (at least 3 characters).
